TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Algeria, title = Algeria, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Algeria} }

S.FORM: Algeria hya' ga cyux maki' tay 28 00 N, 3 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 2,381,741 sq km (maki' tay 10ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2,381,741 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 40,263,711. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga17.30% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 82%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Algiers. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Abdelaziz Bouteflika, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 1999 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxun Gasoring ka suna Gasoring ga piyang yasa smru qnxan na Aruciriya, kbhul ga musa tizyu pgan kahul te sqaniy, sintzyul kahul sqaniy uzi qu lmwan Minsyu nha, ru sinqeru pgal bniran nha pila Koka kahul te sqaniy, aring 1969 kawas lga mzyup squ lahuy na Gasoring Koka. suna Gasoring na Aruciriya ga te magal kinpyux cinbwanan, cinbwanan ga maki te sazing tgbaziy suna Gasoring, kinpyux snku Gasoring cinbwanan ga te mpuw payat, pyung pinbahu nha ga mugi,mugi krahu, tanguw mugi, sgnaw,yutak,tbihi; Koyo ga Kanzyume,ggaliq,lukus maki squ 2006 kawas ga, pin Syobay na Aruciriya linpgan cinbwanan ga 114.73, maki kwara nqu Africa ga te sazing, tmsuruw squ Nanfey. pqbaqun Sinpngan Aruciriya ga ana m'ima huyay mqwas biru, smpuqing gaga Aruciriya, ke Alapo qu spyangun, smpuqing gaga Aruciriya, ke Alapo qu spyangun, mkura Kagak ka payat sngusun na Koka, aring mtzyu kawas tehuk mpuw mtzyu kawas lelaqi ga si ki masoq mqwas biru qeru kawas kwara, mzyup mqwas Cyugak ga 66％. mqwas Cyugak Kokumin Gako ga ini biqiy pila, mqwas Raygak ga maki rnaw mrhuw ka nniqun. 2001-2002 kawas ga 22626 pqwasan wal psrxun, 2003-2004 kawas ga pitu kbhul spat pgan msyaw Mang laqi mqwas, Snsiy ga mtzyul ciwal msyaw Mang hi, pqwasan Kocyuw ga mzimal tzyu, mqwas Raygak ga qutux kbhul mtzyul Mang hi, Snsiy ga qutux Mang spat Seng msyaw hi. Spyang na Raygak ga: Raygak Aruciriya, Raygak Xu'ari pumayting, Raygak Cyunstanting. iyat mnqwas biru ga 27％, musa spat kbhul Mang hi, qsahuy nya ga spayat kbhul mtzyu pgan msyaw Mang hi qu kneril. glgun blaq balay kinlayan nya tuqiy, kinqruyux tuqiy Kisya ga 3,973 Kori, tuqiy Kisya ga cyux mutu squ te raya syaw bsilung, 'mubuy te htgan wagi ru byaqan wagi qu tuqiy Kisya hiya, maki te htgan wagi ga wal mkura Tunisiya na qalang Pisayta, te byaqan wagi ga mu squ Moloko na qalang Kasapulanka, lingay na tuqiy ga cyux tlngayan yaba qalang. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Algeria hya' ga cyux maki' tay 28 00 N, 3 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 2,381,741 sq km (maki' tay 10ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2,381,741 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 40,263,711. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga17.30% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 82%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Algiers. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Abdelaziz Bouteflika, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 1999 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxun Gasoring ka suna Gasoring ga piyang yasa smru qnxan na Aruciriya, kbhul ga musa tizyu pgan kahul te sqaniy, sintzyul kahul sqaniy uzi qu lmwan Minsyu nha, ru sinqeru pgal bniran nha pila Koka kahul te sqaniy, aring 1969 kawas lga mzyup squ lahuy na Gasoring Koka. suna Gasoring na Aruciriya ga te magal kinpyux cinbwanan, cinbwanan ga maki te sazing tgbaziy suna Gasoring, kinpyux snku Gasoring cinbwanan ga te mpuw payat, pyung pinbahu nha ga mugi,mugi krahu, tanguw mugi, sgnaw,yutak,tbihi; Koyo ga Kanzyume,ggaliq,lukus maki squ 2006 kawas ga, pin Syobay na Aruciriya linpgan cinbwanan ga 114.73, maki kwara nqu Africa ga te sazing, tmsuruw squ Nanfey. pqbaqun Sinpngan Aruciriya ga ana m'ima huyay mqwas biru, smpuqing gaga Aruciriya, ke Alapo qu spyangun, smpuqing gaga Aruciriya, ke Alapo qu spyangun, mkura Kagak ka payat sngusun na Koka, aring mtzyu kawas tehuk mpuw mtzyu kawas lelaqi ga si ki masoq mqwas biru qeru kawas kwara, mzyup mqwas Cyugak ga 66％. mqwas Cyugak Kokumin Gako ga ini biqiy pila, mqwas Raygak ga maki rnaw mrhuw ka nniqun. 2001-2002 kawas ga 22626 pqwasan wal psrxun, 2003-2004 kawas ga pitu kbhul spat pgan msyaw Mang laqi mqwas, Snsiy ga mtzyul ciwal msyaw Mang hi, pqwasan Kocyuw ga mzimal tzyu, mqwas Raygak ga qutux kbhul mtzyul Mang hi, Snsiy ga qutux Mang spat Seng msyaw hi. Spyang na Raygak ga: Raygak Aruciriya, Raygak Xu'ari pumayting, Raygak Cyunstanting. iyat mnqwas biru ga 27％, musa spat kbhul Mang hi, qsahuy nya ga spayat kbhul mtzyu pgan msyaw Mang hi qu kneril. glgun blaq balay kinlayan nya tuqiy, kinqruyux tuqiy Kisya ga 3,973 Kori, tuqiy Kisya ga cyux mutu squ te raya syaw bsilung, 'mubuy te htgan wagi ru byaqan wagi qu tuqiy Kisya hiya, maki te htgan wagi ga wal mkura Tunisiya na qalang Pisayta, te byaqan wagi ga mu squ Moloko na qalang Kasapulanka, lingay na tuqiy ga cyux tlngayan yaba qalang. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: alɣeria ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, * ** e na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa * s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa**.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa *.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa alɣiers~ɕ. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa * na taj mawpuw qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*elaziz βoute*lika, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxun ɣas~ɕoriŋ ka s~ɕuna ɣas~ɕoriŋ ɣa pijaŋ jas~ɕa s~ɕmru qnxan na aruʦ~ʨirija, kβħul ɣa mus~ɕa tizju pɣan kaħul te s~ɕqanij, s~ɕintzjul kaħul s~ɕqanij uzi qu lmwan mins~ɕju nħa, ru s~ɕinqeru pɣal βniran nħa pila koka kaħul te s~ɕqanij, ariŋ **** kawas~ɕ lɣa mzjup s~ɕqu laħuj na ɣas~ɕoriŋ koka. s~ɕuna ɣas~ɕoriŋ na aruʦ~ʨirija ɣa te maɣal kinpjux ʦ~ʨinβwanan, ʦ~ʨinβwanan ɣa maki te s~ɕaziŋ tɣβazij s~ɕuna ɣas~ɕoriŋ, kinpjux s~ɕnku ɣas~ɕoriŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan ɣa te mpuw pajat, pjuŋ pinβaħu nħa ɣa muɣi,muɣi kraħu, taŋuw muɣi, s~ɕɣnaw,jutak,tβiħi; kojo ɣa kanzjume,ɣɣaliq,lukus~ɕ maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ ɣa, pin s~ɕjoβaj na aruʦ~ʨirija linpɣan ʦ~ʨinβwanan ɣa ***.**, maki kwara nqu a*riʦ~ʨa ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ, tms~ɕuruw s~ɕqu nan*ej. pqβaqun s~ɕinpŋan aruʦ~ʨirija ɣa ana mʔima ħujaj mqwas~ɕ βiru, s~ɕmpuqiŋ ɣaɣa aruʦ~ʨirija, ke alapo qu s~ɕpjaŋun, s~ɕmpuqiŋ ɣaɣa aruʦ~ʨirija, ke alapo qu s~ɕpjaŋun, mkura kaɣak ka pajat s~ɕŋus~ɕun na koka, ariŋ mtzju kawas~ɕ teħuk mpuw mtzju kawas~ɕ lelaqi ɣa s~ɕi ki mas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βiru qeru kawas~ɕ kwara, mzjup mqwas~ɕ ʦ~ʨjuɣak ɣa ***. mqwas~ɕ ʦ~ʨjuɣak kokumin ɣako ɣa ini βiqij pila, mqwas~ɕ rajɣak ɣa maki rnaw mrħuw ka nniqun. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ɣa ***** pqwas~ɕan wal ps~ɕrxun, ****-**** kawas~ɕ ɣa pitu kβħul s~ɕpat pɣan ms~ɕjaw maŋ laqi mqwas~ɕ, s~ɕns~ɕij ɣa mtzjul ʦ~ʨiwal ms~ɕjaw maŋ ħi, pqwas~ɕan koʦ~ʨjuw ɣa mzimal tzju, mqwas~ɕ rajɣak ɣa qutux kβħul mtzjul maŋ ħi, s~ɕns~ɕij ɣa qutux maŋ s~ɕpat s~ɕeŋ ms~ɕjaw ħi. s~ɕpjaŋ na rajɣak ɣa: rajɣak aruʦ~ʨirija, rajɣak xuʔari pumajtiŋ, rajɣak ʦ~ʨjuns~ɕtantiŋ. ijat mnqwas~ɕ βiru ɣa ***, mus~ɕa s~ɕpat kβħul maŋ ħi, qs~ɕaħuj nja ɣa s~ɕpajat kβħul mtzju pɣan ms~ɕjaw maŋ ħi qu kneril. ɣlɣun βlaq βalaj kinlajan nja tuqij, kinqrujux tuqij kis~ɕja ɣa *,*** kori, tuqij kis~ɕja ɣa ʦ~ʨjux mutu s~ɕqu te raja s~ɕjaw βs~ɕiluŋ, ʔmuβuj te ħtɣan waɣi ru βjaqan waɣi qu tuqij kis~ɕja ħija, maki te ħtɣan waɣi ɣa wal mkura tunis~ɕija na qalaŋ pis~ɕajta, te βjaqan waɣi ɣa mu s~ɕqu moloko na qalaŋ kas~ɕapulanka, liŋaj na tuqij ɣa ʦ~ʨjux tlŋajan jaβa qalaŋ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
